latin: Vir longam orationem de amore habuit. mulier eum interrupit et dixit: 'satis est. tu me iam ab ipso "salve" cepisti.'

questions.target: Giving a long speech about love
choices: Giving a long speech about love

questions.target: He won her over from the moment he said hello
choices: She wants him to be quiet
He won her over from the moment he said hello

translation: The man gave a long speech about love. The woman interrupted him and said: 'Enough. You already won me from the very "hello."'
